title: Evaluating AI Tools and Vendors
subtitle: Make smarter buying decisions before you spend a dollar
description: In 4 lessons, you'll learn how to decide if you actually need AI (or just better processes), how to spot the red flags in vendor sales pitches, what questions to ask before buying anything, and how AI pricing models work — plus a clear framework for deciding whether to build, buy, or wait.

lessons.title: Do You Actually Need AI?
lessons.subtitle: How to tell if AI is the answer — or if simpler automation will do

lessons.title: Red Flags in AI Vendor Pitches
lessons.subtitle: What sales reps say vs. what it actually means

lessons.title: 12 Questions to Ask Before You Buy
lessons.subtitle: The buyer's checklist that cuts through the demo magic

lessons.title: Pricing Models and Build vs. Buy
lessons.subtitle: Understand what you're actually paying for — and when to build your own
